definitions: To clean (a toilet or drain) by causing water to flow through it.
To become red in the face, typically as a result of embarrassment, heat, or strong emotion.
To force (a person or animal) out of a hiding place.
To cause water or another liquid to flow over or through something, typically to cleanse it.
To be in abundance; to be plentiful.
examples: Don't forget to flush the toilet.
The dogs flushed the pheasant from the bushes.
The doctor recommended flushing the wound with saline.
The garden was flushing with roses.
